chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D- 4967 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No. 21368/25 (U/A) 2. For order as to maintainability of petition. 28.10.2025 Mr. Ali Amed Turabi, advocate for petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 2. On the last date of hearing, following order was passed:- “13.10.2025. Mr. Ali Ahmed Turabi, advocate for the petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Per learned counsel the concurrent judgments are against the petitioner with respect to procurement, however, neither has been assailed before us in this petition. Counsel to assist as to maintainability o hereof. Adjourned.” Learned counsel remained unable to dispel the issue of maintainability. Petition is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
